Steps.Text: Log into VISTA and navigate to the Responsibilities section
Search for either the Person or Equipment
Terminate the responsibility of the equipment from the user
Update the location of the equipment in VISTA
Remove the IT comments on equipment if there are any
If this is the last day of user, Update LEAF portal
Delete Computer object in Active Directory
Put computer on the shelf where it belongs
